_meta.description: This file contains a serialized version of schema entities for drift.

columns.name: domain_set_name
columns.defaultConstraints: REFERENCES atomic_domain_sets (name) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE

dialectAwareDefaultConstraints.sqlite: REFERENCES atomic_domain_sets (name) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE

columns.name: app_set_name
columns.defaultConstraints: REFERENCES app_sets (name) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE

dialectAwareDefaultConstraints.sqlite: REFERENCES app_sets (name) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE

columns.name: ip_set_name
columns.defaultConstraints: REFERENCES atomic_ip_sets (name) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE

dialectAwareDefaultConstraints.sqlite: REFERENCES atomic_ip_sets (name) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE

sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "subscriptions" ("updated_at" TEXT NULL, "id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "link" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "remaining_data" REAL NULL, "end_time" INTEGER NULL, "website" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "description" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "last_update" INTEGER NOT NULL, "last_success_update" INTEGER NOT NULL, "place_on_top" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("place_on_top" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "outbound_handlers" ("updated_at" TEXT NULL, "id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "selected" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK ("selected" IN (0, 1)), "country_code" TEXT NOT NULL, "sni" TEXT NOT NULL, "speed" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "speed_test_time" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "ping" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "ping_test_time" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "ok" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "server_ip" TEXT NOT NULL, "config" BLOB NOT NULL, "support6" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "support6_test_time" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "sub_id" INTEGER NULL REFERENCES subscriptions (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "outbound_handler_groups" ("updated_at" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "place_on_top" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("place_on_top" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("name"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "outbound_handler_group_relations" ("group_name" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES outbound_handler_groups (name) ON DELETE CASCADE, "handler_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES outbound_handlers (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, PRIMARY KEY ("group_name", "handler_id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "dns_records" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "dns_record" BLOB NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "atomic_domain_sets" ("updated_at" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "geosite_config" BLOB NULL, "use_bloom_filter" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("use_bloom_filter" IN (0, 1)), "clash_rule_urls" TEXT NULL, "geo_url" TEXT NULL, "inverse" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("inverse" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("name"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "geo_domains" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "geo_domain" BLOB NOT NULL, "domain_set_name" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES atomic_domain_sets (name) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE, UNIQUE ("geo_domain", "domain_set_name"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "great_domain_sets" ("updated_at" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "opposite_name" TEXT NULL, "set" BLOB NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("name"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "atomic_ip_sets" ("updated_at" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "inverse" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("inverse" IN (0, 1)), "geo_ip_config" BLOB NULL, "clash_rule_urls" TEXT NULL, "geo_url" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("name"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "great_ip_sets" ("updated_at" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "great_ip_set_config" BLOB NOT NULL, "opposite_name" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("name"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "app_sets" ("updated_at" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "clash_rule_urls" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("name"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "apps" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "app_set_name" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES app_sets (name) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE, "app_id" BLOB NOT NULL, "icon" BLOB NULL, UNIQUE ("app_id", "app_set_name"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "cidrs" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "ip_set_name" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES atomic_ip_sets (name) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE, "cidr" BLOB NOT NULL, UNIQUE ("cidr", "ip_set_name"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ssh_servers" ("updated_at" TEXT NULL, "id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "address" TEXT NOT NULL, "storage_key" TEXT NOT NULL, "country" TEXT NULL, "auth_method" INTEGER NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "common_ssh_keys" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "name" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "remark" TEXT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "custom_route_modes" ("updated_at" TEXT NULL, "id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "router_config" BLOB NOT NULL, "dns_rules" BLOB NOT NULL DEFAULT x'', "internal_dns_servers" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "handler_selectors" ("updated_at" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "config" BLOB NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("name"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "selector_handler_relations" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "selector_name" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES handler_selectors (name) ON DELETE CASCADE, "handler_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES outbound_handlers (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("selector_name", "handler_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "selector_handler_group_relations" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "selector_name" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES handler_selectors (name) ON DELETE CASCADE, "group_name" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES outbound_handler_groups (name) ON DELETE CASCADE, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("selector_name", "group_name"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "selector_subscription_relations" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "selector_name" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES handler_selectors (name) ON DELETE CASCADE, "subscription_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES subscriptions (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("selector_name", "subscription_id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "dns_servers" ("updated_at" TEXT NULL, "id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "dns_server" BLOB NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
